gherkin:
When the user enters "abc123" in the search field
And Test Data:
* Existing Okta ID: abc123
* Change Client Type: PLAYSTATION → ROKU
* Change Features: MLB_AUDIO → None (remove all features)
Then the user should see 1 matching search result for oktaId "abc123"
And the user should see "PLAYSTATION" as the Client Type for the matching search result
And the user should see 1 chip in the Features column
When the user clicks on the "Edit" icon on the far right of the matching search result
Then the user should see the "Update Override" dialog box open
And the user should see the Okta ID field populated with "abc123"
And the user should see "PLAYSTATION" selected in the Client Type dropdown
And the user should see "MLB_AUDIO" selected in the Features dropdown
When the user clicks on the Client Type dropdown
Then the user should see a list of client types including "ROKU", "IOS", "ANDROID_MOBILE", etc.
When the user selects "ROKU" from the Client Type dropdown
And the user clicks on the Features dropdown
And the user unselects "MLB_AUDIO" from the Features options (removing all features)
And the user clicks the "Save" button
Then the "Update Override" dialog should close
And the user should return to the Overrides page
When the user refreshes the page
And the user enters "abc123" in the search field
Then the user should see 1 matching search result for oktaId "abc123"
And the user should see "ROKU" as the Client Type for the matching search result
And the user should not see any chips in the Features column (no features selected)
